name.value: Use if we want to try and restart WF - Future

.label.text: Use if we want to try and restart WF - Future

value.name: Params
value.description: The Initial XML from Intake Form

value.name: sWorkflowId
value.description: The Unique Workflow Id

value.name: xEnvironmentSettings
value.description: eForm Instance that is  Environmental specific

value.name: xAppSettings
value.description: eForm Instance that is application specific

value.name: xWFData
value.description: The workflow document that is being routed through the workflow. This variable contains all of the intake data along with data used to build workflow logic.

value.name: vDocIDs
value.description: List of documents that will appear in a task

value.name: vRoute
value.description: Workflow route

value.name: vStatus
value.description: The Status based on the route

value.name: vSubWorkflowName
value.description: Name of Sub Workflow that would fail

value.name: vErrorEmailBody
value.description: Error email body that is passed from child workflow or set in this workflow

value.name: sParentFolderID
value.description: Parent Folder ID where all the documents are stored

value.name: sWorkflowStatus
value.description: Status of the workflow

value.name: sAppVersion
value.description: The App Version of the Workflow

value.name: sWorkflowUid
value.description: System WF Id

value.name: vIdentifySource
value.description: Identifies the source of the WF

value.name: vFromNoReply
value.description: The No Reply From Email Address

value.name: vErrorTaskGroup
value.description: Task group recipient of the error email

value.name: vSelectedRouteTG
value.description: Task group who receives the task

value.name: sCLMAccountName
value.description: CLM Account Name used for naming of WFs

value.name: sAppName
value.description: Name of the Application

value.name: dNextRouteSubWF
value.description: The Sub WF to call for next route

value.name: dNextRouteSelection
value.description: The Next Route Selection csv in XML format

value.name: dUpdateMetadataMapping
value.description: The csv for Metadata Mapping

value.code: return GetVariableValue("sCLMAccountName") + " - " + GetVariableValue("sAppName")+ " - Sub - Pre Processor " + GetVariableValue("sAppVersion")
